blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 51°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
